temporal_description: (00:00-00:07) In a dark, chaotic scene, a muscular, pale-skinned monster with long hair and sharp teeth roars as it attacks. It violently stabs a figure on horseback, sending them tumbling to the ground. The monster then turns its attention to another rider, leaping onto their horse and brutally attacking them as well. (Storyline: This opening scene establishes a terrifying and violent threat. A powerful monster is shown to be a formidable and ruthless attacker, easily dispatching multiple victims.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, guttural roar from the monster, followed by the sounds of a struggle, a horse neighing in pain, and a body thudding to the ground. Tense, orchestral music swells in the background.)
